footer.tagline: Agentix builds AI agents that work 24/7 for your business — automating support, sales, marketing, and operations to save time and cost.

hero.subtitle: Agentix builds production-grade AI agents for customer support, sales, scheduling, lead generation, and workflow automation — trained on your data, deployed in days.

dashboard.title: One command center for every AI agent
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor conversations, automation rate, and business impact in real time.

voice.d: Natural voice agents that handle calls in real time.

leads.d: Qualify and route leads to your sales team 24/7.

support.d: Resolve 80% of tickets instantly with tier-1 AI.

workflow.d: Chain multi-step processes with intelligent agents.

crm.d: Sync with Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, and 50+ tools.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: From discovery to scale in weeks, not quarters.

1.d: We audit your workflows and identify high-ROI automation opportunities.

2.d: Our team trains custom agents on your data, tone, and business logic.

3.d: Launch across your existing stack — no code changes, no downtime.

4.d: Continuously optimize with analytics and expand to new use cases.

features.title: Everything you need to run an AI-first business
features.subtitle: Enterprise-grade features in a platform that ships in days.

chat.u1: I need to reschedule my appointment for next Tuesday.
chat.a1: Of course. I see your 3pm slot on Tuesday. Would 2pm or 4pm work better?
chat.a2: Done ✓ Confirmation sent to your email. Anything else?

testimonials.title: Loved by operators
testimonials.subtitle: Teams across industries trust Agentix to run their AI workforce.

1.q: Agentix cut our support response time by 82%. Our team now focuses on complex cases while AI handles the rest — flawlessly.

2.q: We booked 3x more qualified meetings the month we deployed Agentix. The voice agent sounds indistinguishable from our best reps.

3.q: The setup was seamless. Within two weeks we had AI agents running our entire scheduling and follow-up pipeline.

1.q: How long does it take to deploy an AI agent?
1.a: Most agents go live within 2-4 weeks. We handle discovery, training on your data, and integration with your existing stack.

2.a: No. Agentix is fully managed. Our team builds, deploys, and maintains your agents — you review and approve.

3.q: Which platforms do you integrate with?
3.a: 50+ platforms including Salesforce, HubSpot, Zendesk, Intercom, Slack, Shopify, WhatsApp, Twilio, and custom APIs.

4.q: How do you ensure data security?
4.a: SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, and end-to-end encryption. Your data is never used to train foundation models.

5.a: Yes. Agents support 95+ languages natively and switch context seamlessly within a single conversation.

6.q: What if the AI can't answer a question?
6.a: Configurable escalation. Agents hand off to human teammates with full conversation context and suggested next steps.

cta.title: Ready to Build Your AI Workforce?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of teams shipping intelligent automation with Agentix.
